# 7-Day Meal Plan

## Your Profile Summary
- **TDEE (estimated):** ~2,100–2,200 kcal/day (moderate activity assumed)
- **Goal:** Maintenance / balanced nutrition on a budget
- **Avoid:** Shellfish, gluten, lactose, onion, overly salty/sweet foods
- **Super-taster note:** Recipes emphasise balanced, layered flavours without bitterness extremes. Spice levels are moderate and aromatic rather than harsh. Vegetables are cooked to mellow bitterness.

### Budget Strategy
- Base meals around **rice, potatoes, eggs, canned beans/lentils, and cheaper cuts of meat** (chicken thighs, beef mince, pork shoulder)
- Buy spices in bulk (cumin, coriander, smoked paprika, turmeric, chilli flakes, garam masala, curry powder)
- Use coconut milk/cream (lactose-free) for richness
- All sauces/marinades are gluten-free (tamari instead of soy sauce, check curry pastes for GF)
- No onion — substitute with the **green part of spring onions (scallions)** and **asafoetida (hing)** for depth

---

## Estimated Weekly Grocery List (~AUD $70–90)

| Category | Items |
|---|---|
| **Protein** | Chicken thighs (1.5 kg), beef mince (500g), pork shoulder steaks (500g), eggs (1 dozen), canned tuna in oil (2 tins) |
| **Carbs** | Jasmine rice (2 kg bag), potatoes (2 kg bag), corn tortillas (2 packs, check GF), rice noodles (1 pack) |
| **Canned/Dry** | Canned black beans (2), canned lentils (2), canned diced tomatoes (2), canned coconut milk (3), peanut butter (1 jar) |
| **Produce** | Carrots (1 bag), capsicum (2), zucchini (2), baby spinach (1 bag), limes (4), garlic, ginger, spring onions (2 bunches), coriander (1 bunch), cherry tomatoes (1 punnet), avocado (2), sweet potato (2) |
| **Pantry/Spices** | Cumin, coriander (ground), smoked paprika, turmeric, garam masala, chilli flakes, asafoetida, fish sauce, tamari (GF), olive oil, coconut oil, rice wine vinegar |

---

## Day 1 — Monday
### *Theme: Mexican*

**Breakfast — Potato & Egg Breakfast Tacos**
- 2 corn tortillas
- 2 scrambled eggs (cooked in olive oil)
- 1 small potato, diced and pan-fried with smoked paprika & cumin
- Sliced avocado, fresh coriander, squeeze of lime
> *~500 kcal*

**Lunch — Black Bean & Rice Bowl**
- 1 cup cooked jasmine rice
- ½ can black beans, warmed with cumin, smoked paprika, pinch of asafoetida
- Diced capsicum & cherry tomatoes
- Squeeze of lime, fresh coriander
- Drizzle of olive oil
> *~550 kcal*

**Dinner — Mexican Beef Mince Bowls**
- 150g beef mince browned with cumin, smoked paprika, coriander, asafoetida, pinch of chilli flakes
- 1 can diced tomatoes (split across 2 servings — save half)
- Served over rice with sliced avocado, spring onion greens, lime
- Side of corn tortilla chips (cut tortillas into wedges, bake until crispy)
> *~700 kcal*

**Snack — Rice cakes with peanut butter & sliced banana (if desired)**
> *~250 kcal*

---

## Day 2 — Tuesday
### *Theme: Thai*

**Breakfast — Coconut Rice Porridge (Congee-style)**
- ½ cup jasmine rice simmered in 1 cup water + ½ cup coconut milk until creamy
- Topped with a soft-boiled egg, tamari drizzle, spring onion greens, chilli flakes
> *~500 kcal*

**Lunch — Thai Peanut Chicken Rice Bowl**
- 150g chicken thigh, sliced and pan-fried with garlic & ginger
- Peanut sauce: 2 tbsp peanut butter + 1 tbsp tamari + 1 tsp rice wine vinegar + squeeze of lime + splash of warm water
- Over rice with grated carrot, sliced capsicum, coriander
> *~600 kcal*

**Dinner — Thai Red Curry (GF paste — check label)**
- 200g chicken thigh pieces
- 1 can coconut milk + 2 tbsp GF red curry paste
- Diced potato, carrot, zucchini
- Fish sauce (1 tsp), squeeze of lime, fresh basil or coriander
- Served with jasmine rice
> *~750 kcal*

**Snack — Boiled egg + handful of cherry tomatoes**
> *~150 kcal*

---

## Day 3 — Wednesday
### *Theme: Indian*

**Breakfast — Spiced Potato Hash with Eggs**
- 1 large potato, cubed and fried with turmeric, cumin, asafoetida, and mustard seeds (if available)
- 2 fried eggs on top
- Fresh coriander, spring onion greens
> *~500 kcal*

**Lunch — Lentil Dhal with Rice**
- 1 can lentils simmered with ½ can diced tomatoes, turmeric, cumin, garam masala, asafoetida, garlic, ginger
- Splash of coconut milk for creaminess
- Over jasmine rice, topped with coriander
> *~550 kcal*

**Dinner — Indian-Spiced Chicken Thighs with Roast Potatoes**
- 2 chicken thighs marinated in: turmeric, garam masala, cumin, garlic, ginger, olive oil, squeeze of lime
- Roast at 200°C for 35 min
- Roast potato wedges alongside (tossed in olive oil, smoked paprika, salt)
- Side of baby spinach wilted with garlic
> *~750 kcal*

**Snack — Peanut butter on rice cakes**
> *~200 kcal*

---

## Day 4 — Thursday
### *Theme: Thai*

**Breakfast — Thai-style Omelette**
- 3-egg omelette cooked in coconut oil
- Filled with: spring onion greens, coriander, dash of fish sauce, chilli flakes
- Side of leftover rice (fried quickly in the pan if desired)
> *~500 kcal*

**Lunch — Pad Thai-style Rice Noodles**
- Rice noodles (1 portion)
- 1 egg, scrambled through
- Grated carrot, bean sprouts (if available), spring onion greens
- Sauce: 1 tbsp tamari + 1 tbsp fish sauce + 1 tsp sugar + squeeze of lime + 1 tbsp peanut butter (thinned)
- Crushed peanuts on top, coriander
> *~550 kcal*

**Dinner — Thai Coconut Pork with Sweet Potato**
- 200g pork shoulder steak, sliced thin
- Simmered in coconut milk with garlic, ginger, lemongrass (if available), fish sauce, lime
- Cubed sweet potato added to the curry
- Served over jasmine rice
> *~750 kcal*

**Snack — Avocado on rice cakes with lime & salt**
> *~200 kcal*

---

## Day 5 — Friday
### *Theme: Mexican*

**Breakfast — Huevos Rancheros (GF)**
- 2 corn tortillas, lightly fried
- 2 eggs, fried
- Warmed black beans (remaining from cans) with cumin & smoked paprika
- Salsa: diced cherry tomatoes, coriander, lime juice, spring onion greens
- Avocado slices
> *~550 kcal*

**Lunch — Beef Taco Bowl**
- Leftover/new beef mince (150g) with Mexican spices (cumin, paprika, coriander, asafoetida, chilli)
- Rice, black beans, diced capsicum, cherry tomatoes
- Lime, coriander, olive oil drizzle
> *~600 kcal*

**Dinner — Stuffed Capsicums (Mexican-style)**
- 2 capsicums, halved and deseeded
- Stuffed with: seasoned beef mince, rice, diced tomato, black beans, cumin
- Baked at 190°C for 25 min
- Topped with avocado and coriander
> *~650 kcal*

**Snack — Tuna with rice crackers**
> *~200 kcal*

---

## Day 6 — Saturday
### *Theme: Indian*

**Breakfast — Sweet Potato & Egg Scramble**
- 1 sweet potato, cubed and pan-fried with turmeric, cumin, asafoetida
- 2 eggs scrambled through
- Fresh coriander, spring onion greens
> *~500 kcal*

**Lunch — Chicken Tikka-style Wrap (Corn Tortilla)**
- 150g chicken thigh, diced and cooked with garam masala, turmeric, cumin, garlic, ginger
- Wrapped in warmed corn tortillas
- With baby spinach, grated carrot, squeeze of lime
- Drizzle of coconut cream mixed with a pinch of cumin (raita substitute)
> *~550 kcal*

**Dinner — Beef Keema with Potatoes**
- 200g beef mince cooked with garlic, ginger, asafoetida, cumin, coriander, garam masala, turmeric, chilli flakes
- Diced potato and ½ can diced tomatoes added, simmered until potato is tender
- Peas (frozen, if available) stirred through
- Served over jasmine rice with fresh coriander
> *~750 kcal*

**Snack — Boiled eggs (2) with a pinch of cumin salt**
> *~150 kcal*

---

## Day 7 — Sunday
### *Theme: Mix / Meal Prep Friendly*

**Breakfast — Big Aussie Potato & Egg Brekkie**
- 2 large potatoes, sliced and pan-fried until golden with smoked paprika
- 2 eggs, fried
- Grilled cherry tomatoes
- Baby spinach
- Side of avocado
> *~600 kcal*

**Lunch — Tuna Rice Bowl (Thai-inspired)**
- 1 tin tuna (drained)
- Jasmine rice
- Grated carrot, cucumber (if available), spring onion greens
- Dressing: tamari, rice wine vinegar, lime juice, touch of peanut butter, chilli flakes
- Coriander on top
> *~500 kcal*

**Dinner — Slow-Cooked Pork Curry (Indian-style)**
- 250g pork shoulder, cubed
- Browned then simmered low and slow (or pressure cooker) with:
  - 1 can coconut milk, garlic, ginger, asafoetida
  - Garam masala, cumin, coriander, turmeric, chilli
  - Diced potato and carrot
- Served over jasmine rice with fresh coriander and lime
> *~800 kcal*

**Snack — Rice cakes with peanut butter**
> *~200 kcal*

---

## Weekly Nutrition Summary (Approximate Daily Average)

| Macro | Amount |
|---|---|
| **Calories** | 2,000–2,200 kcal |
| **Protein** | 100–130g |
| **Carbs** | 250–300g |
| **Fat** | 70–90g |
| **Fibre** | 25–35g |

---

## Super-Taster Tips Used Throughout

| Consideration | How It's Addressed |
|---|---|
| **Bitterness sensitivity** | Vegetables are cooked (not raw cruciferous veg); spinach is wilted; capsicum is roasted or cooked |
| **Salt sensitivity** | Recipes use moderate seasoning; tamari/fish sauce in small controlled amounts rather than table salt |
| **Sweetness sensitivity** | No added sugar in meals beyond trace amounts for balance in pad thai sauce |
| **Spice/heat** | Aromatic spices (cumin, coriander, garam masala) are prioritised over raw chilli heat; chilli flakes are optional and listed in small amounts |
| **Texture & richness** | Coconut milk/cream adds smooth richness without dairy; peanut butter adds depth without overwhelming |
| **Flavour layering** | Asafoetida + spring onion greens replicate onion depth; garlic + ginger provide aromatic base; lime/acid added at the end for brightness |

---

## Key Label-Check Reminders
- **Corn tortillas:** Verify gluten-free (some brands add wheat flour)
- **Curry pastes:** Check for gluten-containing ingredients (wheat flour, soy sauce vs tamari)
- **Tamari:** Confirm gluten-free on label
- **Stock/broth (if used):** Often contains onion — use homemade garlic-ginger broth or skip
- **Fish sauce:** Naturally GF but always verify

---

*This plan is designed to be flexible — portions can be adjusted up or down based on hunger and activity. Leftovers from dinners make excellent next-day lunches if you prefer to batch cook.*

# 7-Day Meal Plan

## Your Profile Summary
- **TDEE (estimated):** ~2,100–2,200 kcal/day (moderate activity assumed)
- **Goal:** Maintenance / balanced nutrition on a budget
- **Avoid:** Shellfish, gluten, lactose, onion, overly salty/sweet foods
- **Super-taster note:** Recipes emphasise balanced, layered flavours without bitterness extremes; moderate spice levels; umami-forward profiles

---

## Weekly Grocery List (Budget-Friendly)

### Proteins
- Chicken thighs, bone-in skin-on (2 kg)
- Lean beef mince (1 kg)
- Pork shoulder steaks (800 g)
- Eggs (1 dozen)
- Canned tuna in oil (2 tins)

### Carbs & Starches
- Potatoes (3 kg bag)
- Jasmine rice (2 kg bag)
- Corn tortillas (2 packs — verify gluten-free)
- Rice noodles (1 pack)

### Vegetables & Fruit
- Broccoli (2 heads)
- Carrots (1 kg bag)
- Capsicum/bell peppers (4)
- Zucchini (3)
- Baby spinach (2 bags)
- Tomatoes (6)
- Limes (4)
- Bananas (6)
- Avocados (3)
- Bean sprouts (1 bag)
- Fresh coriander (1 bunch)
- Fresh basil (1 bunch)
- Garlic (1 bulb)
- Ginger root (1 knob)
- Lemongrass (2 stalks)

### Pantry / Canned
- Canned black beans (3 tins)
- Canned diced tomatoes (2 tins)
- Canned coconut cream (3 tins)
- Peanut butter (1 jar — natural, no added sugar)
- Fish sauce
- Soy sauce (tamari — gluten-free)
- Curry powder / garam masala
- Ground cumin, smoked paprika, ground coriander, turmeric
- Thai red curry paste (check gluten-free; most are)
- Tomato paste (1 tube)
- Olive oil
- Rice wine vinegar
- Chicken stock powder (gluten-free, onion-free — e.g., Massel brand)

### Dairy Alternatives
- Lactose-free butter or olive oil spread
- Lactose-free yoghurt (500 g tub — for Indian dishes)

---

**Estimated Weekly Grocery Cost: AUD $70–$95** *(Coles/Woolworths pricing, mid-2025; pantry staples assumed partially stocked)*

---

## Day 1 — Monday

### Breakfast
**Potato & Egg Hash**
- 2 medium potatoes, diced and pan-fried in olive oil until crispy
- 2 eggs, fried
- Pinch of smoked paprika, salt & pepper
- Side of sliced avocado

*~550 kcal | P: 22g | C: 55g | F: 28g*

### Lunch
**Mexican Black Bean & Beef Bowl**
- 150g beef mince browned with cumin, smoked paprika, garlic
- ½ tin black beans, rinsed
- Jasmine rice (1 cup cooked)
- Diced tomato, coriander, squeeze of lime
- ½ avocado

*~650 kcal | P: 38g | C: 65g | F: 24g*

### Dinner
**Thai Red Curry Chicken with Rice**
- 200g chicken thigh, sliced
- 1 tbsp red curry paste fried in a little oil
- ½ tin coconut cream
- Capsicum strips, zucchini slices, carrots
- Splash of fish sauce, squeeze of lime, fresh basil
- Served over jasmine rice (1 cup cooked)

*~700 kcal | P: 40g | C: 60g | F: 32g*

### Snack
- Banana with 1 tbsp peanut butter

*~200 kcal*

**Daily Total: ~2,100 kcal**

---

## Day 2 — Tuesday

### Breakfast
**Savoury Rice Bowl**
- Leftover jasmine rice (1 cup), warmed in a pan
- 2 eggs, scrambled with a splash of tamari
- Sliced avocado
- Drizzle of sriracha (optional)

*~500 kcal | P: 20g | C: 50g | F: 24g*

### Lunch
**Loaded Potato with Tuna**
- 1 large baked potato
- 1 tin tuna (drained), mixed with lactose-free yoghurt, diced capsicum, squeeze of lemon
- Baby spinach on the side

*~550 kcal | P: 35g | C: 55g | F: 16g*

### Dinner
**Indian Beef Keema with Potatoes**
- 200g beef mince
- Garlic, ginger, cumin, ground coriander, turmeric, garam masala
- ½ tin diced tomatoes, 1 tbsp tomato paste
- 1 medium potato, diced small (cooks in the sauce)
- Fresh coriander to finish
- Served with jasmine rice

*~750 kcal | P: 42g | C: 70g | F: 28g*

### Snack
- Corn tortilla chips (bake cut tortillas with oil & salt) with mashed avocado

*~250 kcal*

**Daily Total: ~2,050 kcal**

---

## Day 3 — Wednesday

### Breakfast
**Peanut Butter Banana Smoothie**
- 1 banana, 2 tbsp peanut butter, 1 cup coconut cream (diluted with water), ice
- Blend until smooth

*~450 kcal | P: 12g | C: 40g | F: 28g*

### Lunch
**Thai-Style Peanut Chicken Lettuce Wraps** *(or over rice)*
- 150g leftover or freshly cooked chicken thigh, shredded
- Sauce: 1 tbsp peanut butter, tamari, lime juice, rice wine vinegar, pinch of sugar, warm water to thin
- Shredded carrots, capsicum, bean sprouts, coriander
- Wrapped in large lettuce leaves or served over rice

*~550 kcal | P: 36g | C: 35g | F: 28g*

### Dinner
**Mexican Beef Tacos**
- 200g beef mince, seasoned with cumin, smoked paprika, garlic, ground coriander
- Warmed corn tortillas (3–4)
- Diced tomato salsa (tomato, coriander, lime, pinch of salt)
- Sliced avocado
- Lactose-free yoghurt as "sour cream"
- Baby spinach

*~750 kcal | P: 42g | C: 58g | F: 30g*

### Snack
- 2 boiled eggs with a pinch of smoked paprika

*~150 kcal*

**Daily Total: ~1,900 kcal**

---

## Day 4 — Thursday

### Breakfast
**Potato Rösti with Eggs**
- 2 medium potatoes, grated, squeezed dry, pan-fried in olive oil as patties
- 2 fried eggs on top
- Side of baby spinach

*~550 kcal | P: 22g | C: 50g | F: 28g*

### Lunch
**Indian Spiced Potato & Black Bean Bowl**
- 1 large potato, cubed and roasted with turmeric, cumin, smoked paprika
- ½ tin black beans, warmed with garlic and ground coriander
- Dollop of lactose-free yoghurt
- Fresh coriander, lime wedge
- Rice on the side

*~600 kcal | P: 18g | C: 85g | F: 14g*

### Dinner
**Thai Coconut Pork Curry**
- 200g pork shoulder steak, sliced thin
- 1 tbsp red curry paste
- ½ tin coconut cream
- Zucchini, carrots, capsicum
- Lemongrass (bruised), fish sauce, lime, basil
- Jasmine rice

*~750 kcal | P: 40g | C: 60g | F: 34g*

### Snack
- Banana

*~100 kcal*

**Daily Total: ~2,000 kcal**

---

## Day 5 — Friday

### Breakfast
**Egg & Avocado Corn Tortilla Wrap**
- 2 eggs scrambled
- ½ avocado, sliced
- Wrapped in 2 warmed corn tortillas
- Dash of hot sauce

*~450 kcal | P: 18g | C: 30g | F: 28g*

### Lunch
**Leftover Thai Coconut Pork Curry**
- Reheated over fresh jasmine rice
- Topped with fresh coriander and lime

*~700 kcal | P: 38g | C: 60g | F: 32g*

### Dinner
**Pad Thai-Style Rice Noodles**
- Rice noodles (1 serve)
- 150g chicken thigh, sliced and stir-fried
- Garlic, ginger
- Sauce: tamari, fish sauce, rice wine vinegar, squeeze of lime, pinch of sugar
- Bean sprouts, shredded carrot, capsicum
- Crushed peanuts on top, fresh coriander & lime wedge

*~650 kcal | P: 35g | C: 70g | F: 22g*

### Snack
- Corn tortilla chips with smashed avocado

*~250 kcal*

**Daily Total: ~2,050 kcal**

---

## Day 6 — Saturday

### Breakfast
**Big Brekkie Fry-Up (GF)**
- 2 eggs, fried
- 2 pork sausages *(check gluten-free — many Aussie brands offer GF)*
- Pan-fried potato slices
- Grilled tomato halves
- Baby spinach wilted in the pan

*~650 kcal | P: 32g | C: 40g | F: 38g*

### Lunch
**Mexican Chicken Bowl**
- 150g chicken thigh, seasoned with cumin, paprika, garlic, cooked and sliced
- Rice, black beans, diced tomato
- Avocado, coriander, lime
- Lactose-free yoghurt drizzle

*~650 kcal | P: 40g | C: 65g | F: 22g*

### Dinner
**Indian Butter Chicken (Dairy-Free Version)**
- 250g chicken thigh, cubed
- Garlic, ginger, garam masala, cumin, turmeric, smoked paprika
- ½ tin diced tomatoes + 1 tbsp tomato paste
- ½ tin coconut cream (replaces butter/cream beautifully)
- Simmer until thick and rich
- Fresh coriander
- Jasmine rice

*~750 kcal | P: 45g | C: 60g | F: 30g*

### Snack
- Peanut butter on banana slices

*~200 kcal*

**Daily Total: ~2,250 kcal**

---

## Day 7 — Sunday

### Breakfast
**Potato & Veggie Scramble**
- Leftover potatoes, diced and crisped in a pan
- Diced capsicum, baby spinach
- 2 eggs scrambled through
- Fresh coriander, dash of hot sauce

*~500 kcal | P: 22g | C: 45g | F: 24g*

### Lunch
**Leftover Butter Chicken Bowl**
- Reheated over rice
- Side of fresh baby spinach salad with lime dressing

*~700 kcal | P: 42g | C: 60g | F: 28g*

### Dinner
**Slow-Cooked Mexican Pulled Pork Tacos**
- Remaining pork shoulder, slow-cooked (oven 160°C, 3 hrs, covered) with:
  - Cumin, smoked paprika, garlic, ground coriander, diced tomatoes, splash of tamari, lime juice
- Shred with forks
- Serve in corn tortillas with:
  - Quick-pickled carrots (rice wine vinegar, pinch of sugar, salt)
  - Avocado, coriander, lime
  - Lactose-free yoghurt

*~750 kcal | P: 42g | C: 55g | F: 32g*

### Snack
- Boiled egg + banana

*~200 kcal*

**Daily Total: ~2,150 kcal**

---

## Weekly Summary

| Day | Calories | Protein | Key Cuisine |
|-----|----------|---------|-------------|
| Mon | ~2,100 | ~100g | Thai / Mexican |
| Tue | ~2,050 | ~97g | Indian |
| Wed | ~1,900 | ~90g | Thai / Mexican |
| Thu | ~2,000 | ~80g | Thai / Indian |
| Fri | ~2,050 | ~91g | Thai |
| Sat | ~2,250 | ~117g | Indian / Mexican |
| Sun | ~2,150 | ~106g | Mexican / Indian |

**Weekly Average: ~2,070 kcal/day | ~97g protein/day**

---

## Super-Taster Notes

Since you carry the super-tasting gene, this plan is designed with the following in mind:

- **Bitterness is minimised** — limited use of raw cruciferous veg; broccoli is always cooked. No kale or rocket.
- **Umami-forward flavours** — fish sauce, tamari, slow-cooked meats, and tomato paste provide depth without relying on salt.
- **Balanced spice** — curry pastes and spice blends are used at moderate levels. You can always scale up, but starting moderate avoids overwhelming a sensitive palate.
- **Richness via coconut cream** — replaces dairy and adds smooth, rounded flavour that super-tasters tend to enjoy.
- **Acidity as a flavour tool** — lime juice and rice wine vinegar brighten dishes without needing excess salt or sugar.

---

## Meal Prep Tips

1. **Sunday arvo:** Cook a big batch of jasmine rice for the week. Refrigerate in portions.
2. **Cook pork shoulder on Sunday** for tacos — leftovers can be frozen.
3. **Boil 4–6 eggs** at the start of the week for quick snacks.
4. **Double the keema or butter chicken** — freezes brilliantly for lazy nights.
5. **Potatoes:** Bake 3–4 at once; reheat throughout the week for hash, sides, or loaded potatoes.

# 7-Day Meal Plan

## Your Profile Summary
- **TDEE (estimated):** ~2,100–2,200 kcal/day (moderate activity assumed)
- **Goal:** Maintenance / balanced nutrition on a budget
- **Avoid:** Shellfish, gluten, lactose, onion, overly salty/sweet foods
- **Notes:** Super-taster — meals emphasize balanced, nuanced flavours rather than extreme or bitter profiles. Dairy substitutions use lactose-free options. All grains are gluten-free.

---

## Weekly Grocery List (Budget-Focused)

### Proteins
- Chicken thighs (bone-in, skin-on) — 2 kg
- Lean ground beef (mince) — 1 kg
- Pork shoulder steaks — 750 g
- Eggs — 1 dozen
- Canned tuna in olive oil — 2 tins (95 g each)

### Carbs & Starches
- White potatoes — 3 kg
- Jasmine rice — 2 kg bag
- Corn tortillas — 2 packs
- Rice noodles — 1 pack (400 g)
- Gluten-free rolled oats — 500 g

### Vegetables & Herbs
- Carrots — 1 kg bag
- Broccoli — 2 heads
- Baby spinach — 1 large bag
- Capsicum (bell peppers) — 4
- Zucchini — 3
- Tomatoes — 6
- Cherry tomatoes — 1 punnet
- Garlic — 1 bulb
- Ginger root — 1 knob
- Limes — 4
- Lemons — 2
- Fresh coriander — 2 bunches
- Avocados — 3

- Cos (romaine) lettuce — 1 head

- Green beans — 300 g
- Frozen peas — 1 bag

- Coconut milk — 3 cans (400 ml)
- Canned diced tomatoes — 3 cans
- Canned black beans — 2 cans
- Canned chickpeas — 1 can

- Coconut oil

### Dairy Alternatives & Other

- Lactose-free butter — 1 block (or use olive oil/coconut oil)
- Lactose-free tasty cheese — 1 small block (Liddells or Zymil)
- Bananas — 6
- Peanut butter

---

## Estimated Weekly Cost: **AUD $80–$110**
*(Based on Coles/Woolworths pricing, assuming you already have basic pantry spices and oils)*

---

## Day-by-Day Meal Plan

---

## 🟢 DAY 1 — Monday
**Theme: Mexican**

### Breakfast — Potato & Egg Breakfast Tacos
- 2 corn tortillas
- 2 scrambled eggs (cooked in lactose-free butter)
- 1 small potato, diced and pan-fried with smoked paprika and cumin
- Sliced avocado
- Fresh coriander and a squeeze of lime
- Pinch of salt and pepper

> **~500 kcal | P: 22g | C: 48g | F: 24g**

### Lunch — Mexican Chicken & Black Bean Bowl
- 150 g chicken thigh, seasoned with cumin, smoked paprika, oregano, garlic
- Pan-fried or grilled, then sliced
- ½ can black beans, rinsed and warmed with a pinch of cumin
- 1 cup jasmine rice
- Diced tomato, coriander, lime juice
- Shredded cos lettuce

> **~650 kcal | P: 42g | C: 72g | F: 18g**

### Dinner — Slow-Cooked Beef Chilli (No Onion)
- 200 g beef mince, browned with garlic, cumin, smoked paprika, chilli flakes, oregano
- ½ can diced tomatoes
- ½ can black beans
- 1 diced capsicum
- 1 diced zucchini
- Tablespoon tomato paste
- Simmer 25–30 mins
- Serve over rice with avocado, coriander, lime

> **~700 kcal | P: 40g | C: 68g | F: 26g**

### Snack — Banana with Peanut Butter
- 1 banana + 1 tbsp natural peanut butter

> **~250 kcal | P: 7g | C: 30g | F: 10g**

**Daily Total: ~2,100 kcal | P: 111g | C: 218g | F: 78g**

---

## 🟢 DAY 2 — Tuesday
**Theme: Thai**

### Breakfast — Coconut Rice Porridge (Jok-inspired)
- ½ cup jasmine rice, cooked in 1 cup water + ¼ can coconut milk until thick and porridge-like
- 1 soft-boiled egg on top
- Drizzle of tamari
- Sliced ginger, coriander, white pepper

> **~450 kcal | P: 12g | C: 55g | F: 18g**

### Lunch — Thai Basil Chicken Stir-Fry (Pad Krapow style)
- 200 g chicken thigh, diced
- Stir-fry with garlic, chilli, capsicum, green beans
